    Transparent Pricing

    Choose Your Learning Path

    All payments in USDC on Base L2. Low gas fees, instant settlement, full transparency. No hidden charges.

    Explorer
    Get started with DeFi fundamentals at no cost.
    $0
    Free forever

    • ✓ Community chat access
    • ✓ Learning articles & glossary
    • ✓ Leaderboard & XP tracking

    • — 1-on-1 consultations
    • — Certification NFTs
    • — Revenue analytics

    Professional
    Full access to all courses and certifications.

    USDC / year

    For teams, universities, and enterprise onboarding.
    Custom
    Tailored to your organization

    • ✓ Unlimited team seats

    Individual Course Pricing

    Prefer to purchase courses individually? No subscription required.

    Beginner

    Foundational DeFi & blockchain courses

    Free – $50

    USDC per course
    Intermediate

    Security, governance & protocol design

    $75 – $100

    USDC per course
    Advanced

    Yield strategies & tokenomics mastery

    $150 – $200

    USDC per course
    Consultations

    1-on-1 expert sessions

    $75 – $250

    USDC / 30 min

    FAQ

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Everything you need to know about our pricing, payments, and plans.

    Revenue Split

    All course payments are transparently split via 0xSplits on Base chain:

    90%
    Educator
    5%
    Treasury
    5%
    Rewards
    How do I pay with USDC?+
    Connect your Web3 wallet (MetaMask or Rabby) and ensure you have USDC on the Base L2 network. Payments are processed through Helio with near-zero gas fees. You can also bridge USDC from Ethereum mainnet to Base using the official Base Bridge.
    Can I get a refund?+
    Since payments are processed on-chain, refunds are handled case-by-case. If you're unsatisfied within the first 7 days and have completed less than 20% of the course, contact us at info@tokenomic.org for a full refund.
    What are certification NFTs?+
    Upon completing a course, Professional and Institution members receive a non-transferable (soulbound) NFT on Base chain that verifies your completion. This certificate is permanently linked to your wallet and can be verified by employers or institutions.
    Do you offer team discounts?+
    Yes. The Institution plan includes volume pricing for teams of 10+. Contact our sales team for a custom quote tailored to your organization's needs, including white-label options.
    Why USDC on Base instead of traditional payment?+
    Base L2 offers transaction fees under $0.01, instant settlement, and full on-chain transparency. Using USDC means stable pricing without crypto volatility. All revenue splits are automated via 0xSplits smart contracts, ensuring fair and transparent distribution.
    Can I switch plans later?+
    Absolutely. You can upgrade from Explorer to Professional at any time. Your progress, XP, and community memberships carry over. When upgrading mid-year, you only pay the prorated difference.

    Ready to Start Your DeFi Education?

    Connect your wallet and begin learning today. No credit card required.
